name: SeekingContext Memory
description: Universal agent memory with hybrid vector + keyword search, three-tier context (L0/L1/L2), and cross-framework namespace isolation.

apiUrl.label: Server URL
apiUrl.help: SeekingContext REST API URL. Start with: uv run seeking-context-api

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically capture important information after each agent turn

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories before each agent turn

topK.label: Top K Results
topK.help: Maximum memories to retrieve per search

captureMaxChars.label: Capture Max Chars
captureMaxChars.help: Maximum message length eligible for auto-capture
